prompt: Our API uses JWT tokens. The login endpoint returns {"access_token": "..."}. How do I test that auth is working correctly — both valid tokens and invalid/missing tokens?
expected_output: Get token: TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"...","password":"..."}' | jq -r '.access_token'). Test valid: curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://localhost:3000/api/protected (expect 200). Test invalid: curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer invalid.token' http://localhost:3000/api/protected (expect 401). Test missing: curl http://localhost:3000/api/protected (expect 401).
